ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "original_title" TEXT /* Original title of the movie */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Brief overview of the movie */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline of the movie */,
  "homepage" TEXT /* Homepage of the movie */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the movie (e.g., Released, Upcoming) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the movie in USD */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue of the movie in USD */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity of the movie (based on user ratings) */,
  "vote_average" REAL /* Average user rating of the movie */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Total number of user ratings */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDB ID of the movie */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie trailer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Action, Adventure, etc.) */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company (e.g., Walt Disney Pictures, etc.) */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the production company */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the production company was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_production_companies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production company */,
  "production_role" TEXT /* Role of the production company in the movie (e.g., Producer, Distributor, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the production country (e.g., United States of America, etc.) */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code of the production country (e.g., US, UK, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_production_countries" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spoken_languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spoken language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the spoken language (e.g., English, Français, etc.) */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* ISO 639-1 code of the spoken language (e.g., en, fr, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_spoken_languages" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spoken language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, producer, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the movie */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (on a scale of 1-10) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was given */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text given by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who commented on the movie */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text given by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_comments_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword_name" TEXT /* Name of the keyword (e.g., culture clash, future, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_keywords" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_cast" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person (actor/actress) */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the person */,
  "credit_order" INTEGER /* Order of credit for the person in the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_cast_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES people ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_cast_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "people" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each person */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the person */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the person */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the person (if applicable) */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_crew" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person (crew member) */,
  "job" TEXT /* Job title of the person in the movie */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the person in the movie (e.g., Directing, Production, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_crew_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_crew_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES people ("person_id")
)
